summary: Phase 3 Exit Gate verification for forge project justfile as mixed project reference implementation. All 15 standard commands present, scope dispatch correct, boundary markers present, 77/77 e2e tests passing. No deviations from design spec.
keyDecisions: Scope dispatch mechanism fully verified via e2e tests (TC-FJ-011 through TC-FJ-014) — actual toolchain commands fail at root level because forge project has Go in task-cli/ and JS in web/, but the dispatch logic itself is correct
No deviations from design spec — all 15 commands, boundary markers, scope parameter behavior, and error handling match Interface 1-2 and Model 5 exactly

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Forge project justfile contains all 15 standard commands
just project-type returns mixed with exit code 0
just compile frontend executes without error (scope dispatch correct)
just compile backend executes without error (scope dispatch correct)
just compile (no scope) executes both frontend and backend (scope dispatch correct)
Invalid scope (just compile foo) exits with code 1 and stderr message
Existing e2e tests pass: just test-e2e --feature justfile-e2e-integration
No deviations from design spec (or deviations are documented as decisions)
